introSection: Toirog Zam is a steel roller coaster located at National Amusement Park in Ulaanbaatar, Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has vertical loop and double corkscrew.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Red track and blue supports. The supports for the vertical loop and corkscrew are yellow.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are held in by Over-the-shoulder harness.

fullText:
Toirog Zam is a steel roller coaster located at National Amusement Park in Ulaanbaatar, Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia.

The ride has vertical loop and double corkscrew.

Red track and blue supports. The supports for the vertical loop and corkscrew are yellow.

Riders are held in by Over-the-shoulder harness.
